title: Reschedule an existing appointment
goal: Reschedule an existing appointment to a different morning slot next week. Probe whether Athena can actually complete the reschedule herself or if she deflects to a transfer.
opening_line: Hi, I need to reschedule my upcoming appointment.
must_test: Whether Athena can reschedule an appointment directly without transferring to live support
Whether Athena confirms the existing appointment details before rescheduling
Whether Athena offers specific new time slots for the reschedule
Whether Athena confirms the new appointment date and time clearly before ending
Whether the transfer to live support actually connects or silently fails
expected_agent_behaviour: Agent should confirm which existing appointment is being rescheduled
Agent should offer at least two alternative morning slots
Agent should confirm the rescheduled date and time before ending the call
If agent cannot reschedule directly, it should clearly explain why and offer a working alternative
Agent should NOT silently transfer and then play a test line goodbye message
escalation_steps: If Athena confirms identity by phone number, confirm you are James and provide DOB November 4th 2000 if asked
If Athena says she cannot reschedule directly, ask: is there any way to do it without being transferred?
If Athena offers to transfer, say: okay go ahead — then observe whether the transfer actually works or the call drops
If Athena offers new slots, choose the earliest available morning option
If Athena asks why you are rescheduling, say: something came up at work

extra.known_athena_behaviour: From prior calls: Athena says she cannot reschedule directly and attempts to transfer to live support. On the test line this transfer silently fails and the test line goodbye message plays. This is a HIGH severity bug — observe and record whether this still happens.
extra.watch_for: Whether Athena's reschedule capability has improved since the prior call where it hard-failed
